calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that the Petition for Letters of Administration has been continued multiple times. The Petition for Letters of Administration was taken off calendar without prejudice to a request by Mr. Strain if and when he intends to proceed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-03-2013 Continued To May-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Strain for Bryan Wong

Mr. Strain reported that the last relative agreed to declination, nomination and waiver of bond, and that they should have the papers by next week. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to May 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy Loos.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Continued To Apr-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Strain for Petitioner.

Mr. Strain stated that the Heirs were being slow in getting the declinations and nominations back to them, and that he was hoping they will waive bond as well. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to April 3, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-26-2012 Continued To Jan-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Continued To Dec-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Continued To Dec-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Strain for Petitioner.

Counsel reported that he has mailed the Proof of Service to the court for filing and that he is accepting the bond in the amount of $190,000.00. The Court stated that the Proof of Service has not been filed and reviewed. Counsel stated the reason for this petition is that the Petitioner needs the authority to file a claim for the decedent's unclaimed property from the State. The matter was continued to December 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Harris.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Continued To Nov-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Strain for Petitioner.

Mr. Strain stated that they were still waiting to obtain bond waivers from the Beneficiaries and requested three more weeks. The Court directed Counsel to review and address the list of issues indicated by the Probate Examiner in the notes. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to November 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
